mapper.select:
SELECT gv.row_type, gv.node_id, gv.parent_id,
gv.project_code, gv.project_name, gv.project_status, gv.project_status_name,
gv.type_code, gv.type_name, gv.type_level, gv.par_type_code, gv.par_type_name,
gv.issue_code, gv.par_issue_code, gv.title, gv.priority, gv.issue_status, gv.progress, gv.assignee_code, gv.assignee_name, gv.created_at, gv.started_at, gv.due_at, gv.resolved_at
FROM gantt_view gv WHERE EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT user_code, project_code FROM VW_USER_PROJECT_AUTH ) vupa WHERE vupa.user_code = #{userCode} AND vupa.project_code = gv.project_code ) AND EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM VW_USER_AUTH vua WHERE vua.user_code = #{userCode} AND vua.project_code = gv.project_code AND ( (vua.admin_ck = 'Y' AND vua.status IN ('OD1','OD3')) OR (NVL(vua.admin_ck,'N') = 'N' AND vua.status = 'OD1') ) )
START WITH parent_id IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR node_id = parent_id ORDER SIBLINGS BY CASE row_type WHEN 'PROJECT' THEN 1 WHEN 'TYPE' THEN 2 WHEN 'ISSUE' THEN 3 END, type_code, CASE priority WHEN '긴급' THEN 1 WHEN '높음' THEN 2 WHEN '보통' THEN 3 WHEN '낮음' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, issue_code
